channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Markets Steady as War Fatigue Sets In, Focus Shifts to Fed and Global Central Banks
item.description: Markets were steady in Asian session today, with equities posting modest gains led by Japan, as investors showed signs of “war fatigue” amid the ongoing Middle East conflict. Despite continued escalation between Iran, Israel and the U.S., price action across major asset classes has become increasingly muted, suggesting that geopolitical risks are n... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: AUD/CAD targets 0.9889 as BoC dovish risk supports breakout setup
item.description: AUD/CAD moved higher this week as markets increasingly positioned for a divergence in policy outlook between the RBA and the BoC. Attention now turns to the BoC decision today, where rates are expected to remain unchanged at 2.25% for the third consecutive meeting. Notably, this level already sits at the lower bound of the Bank’s […] The post... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Canadian Dollar softens ahead of Fed, BoC rate decisions
item.description: The USD/CAD pair trades with mild gains around 1.3700 during the early European trading hours on Wednesday. Markets turn cautious ahead of critical interest rate decisions from both the Federal Reserve (Fed) and the Bank of Canada (BoC) later on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold extends the range play around $5,000 as Middle East tensions lend support ahead of Fed
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) extends its sideways consolidative price move around the $5,000 psychological mark heading into the European session on Wednesday as traders seem hesitant ahead of the crucial FOMC decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: NASDAQ analysis today: Nasdaq futures show bullish repair as buyers defend key support
item.description: NQ analysis: order flow points to a bullish repair, but not a runaway breakout Nasdaq price prediction today leans bullish, with a market bias score of +5.8 at investingLive.co, as order flow improves and the Point of Control shifts higher. The recovery looks real, but this still needs to prove it can turn into a lasting trend rather than just a sh... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: AUD/USD Price Forecast: More upside likely amid hawkish RBA bets
item.description: The AUD/USD pair trades 0.15% higher at around 0.7115 during the late Asian trading session on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: FX option expiries for 18 March 10am New York cut
item.description: There is perhaps just one to take note of on the day, as highlighted in bold below. That being for USD/JPY at the 159.00 level. The drop yesterday owes much to a loss in momentum for the dollar, as broader risk sentiment picked up across markets. That is continuing today but the major currencies space is yet to really respond so far. The expiries d... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/INR opens flat as Fed’s policy comes under the spotlight
item.description: The Indian Rupee (INR) opens almost flat against the US Dollar (USD) on Wednesday. The USD/INR pair wobbles around 92.80 as investors shift to the sidelines ahead of the Federal Reserve’s (Fed) monetary policy announcement at 23:30 IST (18:00 GMT). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: “Hawkish hold” may disappoint as Fed avoids committing either way
item.description: The Federal Reserve is widely expected to leave interest rates unchanged at 3.50–3.75% today, with little room for surprise on the decision itself. Instead, markets are focused squarely on the message. While many participants are bracing for a “hawkish hold,” that expectation may prove too simplistic for a Fed facing growing risks on both sides [&#... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: EUR/GBP weakens below 0.8650 as traders await ECB, BoE rate decisions
item.description: The EUR/GBP cross loses ground to near 0.8635, snapping the four-day winning streak during the early European session on Wednesday. Markets are in a "wait-and-see" mode ahead of the European Central Bank (ECB) and the Bank of England (BoE) interest rate decisions later on Thursday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/CHF holds gains near 0.7850 ahead of Fed interest rate decision
item.description: USD/CHF gains ground after two days of losses, trading around 0.7850 during the Asian hours on Wednesday. The pair holds ground as the US Dollar (USD) remains steady on market caution ahead of the Federal Reserve’s (Fed) policy decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold remains depressed below $5,000 as Fed expectations counter Middle East tensions
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) edges lower during the Asian session on Wednesday, though it remains confined in a range held since the beginning of this week as traders opt to wait for the crucial FOMC decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Flat lines below 200-hour SMA/1.1550 ahead of central bank events
item.description: The EUR/USD pair struggles to capitalize on this week's goodish recovery move from the 1.1415-1.1410 area, or its lowest level since August 2025, and oscillates in a narrow band during the Asian session on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Oil price surge sees momentum being tested, are markets too complacent?
item.description: US stocks posted back-to-back daily gains in trading yesterday for the first time since the end of February. And S P 500 futures are looking poised again, up another 0.4% today. The better market mood yesterday came despite oil prices holding higher but today, we are starting to see a drop in oil after this headline here: Iraq, KRG agree to resume ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: AUD/JPY Price Forecast: Positive bias prevails, eyes resistance above 113.50
item.description: The AUD/JPY cross posts modest gains around 113.00 during the early European session on Wednesday. The Australian Dollar (AUD) strengthens against the Japanese Yen (JPY) after the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) delivers a rate hike and keeps a hawkish tone. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Event Guide: BOE Monetary Policy Statement (March 2026)
item.description: With rates on hold at 3.75% and the focus squarely on the MPC vote count and Bailey’s tone, here’s how Sterling traders can position for the outcome. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Event Guide: ECB Monetary Policy Statement (March 2026)
item.description: There’s been some chatter of a potential ECB rate hike soon, so traders will be looking to the actual central bank announcement for some clarity. Here’s what to look out for. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Japanese Yen flattens against US Dollar around 159.00 in countdown to Fed’s policy
item.description: The Japanese Yen (JPY) trades almost flat around 159.00 against the US Dollar (USD) during the Asian trading session on Wednesday. The USD/JPY pair consolidates as investors await the Federal Reserve’s (Fed) monetary policy announcement at 18:00 GMT. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: NZD/USD trades above mid-0.5800s but remains capped ahead of FOMC decision
item.description: The NZD/USD pair edges higher during the Asian session on Wednesday and currently trades just above mid-0.5800s, though it lacks bullish conviction. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Australian Dollar gathers strength as RBA hikes rates, Fed rate decision looms
item.description: The AUD/USD pair gains traction to near 0.7115 during the Asian trading hours on Wednesday. The Australian Dollar (AUD) strengthens against the US Dollar (USD) after a hawkish interest rate hike from the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/JPY Conundrum: Intervention risk looms as central banks meet (Fed-BoJ double-header)
item.description: USD/JPY nears 160.00 amid a high-stakes "central bank double-header." This analysis details the Fed and BoJ's upcoming decisions, potential rate impacts, and key scenarios that could trigger FX intervention by the Japanese Ministry of Finance this week. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Japan exports beat forecasts but lose momentum from prior surge
item.description: Japan swings to trade surplus as exports beat expectations despite weak China demand. Summary: Japan February exports +4.2% y/y (exp. +1.6%, prior +16.8%) Imports +10.2% y/y (exp. +11.5%, prior -2.5%) Trade balance +¥57.3bn (exp. -¥483.2bn, prior -¥1.15tn) Exports to China -10.9% y/y, US -8% y/y Exports to EU +14% y/y, Asia +2.8% y/y Data shows mix... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Australia leading index steady. Growth outlook softens to below trend on rate hikes & war
item.description: Australia’s leading index holds just above trend, but momentum is fading as headwinds build. Summary: Westpac–Melbourne Institute Leading Index held at +0.08% in February (unchanged from January) Down from +0.13% in September, signalling moderating momentum Growth remains slightly above trend but losing pace Financial components (ASX cooling) offse... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Japan firms set for strong wage hikes as labour shortages persist, outlook uncertain
item.description: Japan wage growth remains strong, but Middle East risks cloud sustainability. Info via Reuters. Summary: Major Japanese firms set to deliver strong pay hikes in annual wage talks Wage growth momentum extends into a fourth consecutive year Early deals include Mitsubishi Motors agreeing to +5.1% pay rise Rengo unions seeking +5.94% vs +6.09% last yea... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Japan manufacturers sentiment hits four-year high, but outlook dims on Middle East risks
item.description: Japan factory sentiment jumps to four-year high, but outlook softens on geopolitical risks. Summary: Japan Reuters Tankan: manufacturers sentiment +18 (prior +13) — highest since Dec 2021 Non-manufacturers steady at +25 (prior +25) June outlook: manufacturers seen at +14, non-manufacturers +21 Strength driven by semiconductors, chemicals, and trans... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: GBP/USD steadies ahead of back-to-back Fed and BoE decisions
item.description: The Pound Sterling edged higher for a second session as traders brace for Wednesday's Fed hold and Thursday's BoE rate decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: RBA hikes to 4.10%. Split decision. Inflation risks & demand pressures. Where to now?
item.description: RBA delivers second straight hike as inflation risks dominate, with May move finely balanced. Recap via Commonwealth Bank of Australia analysts, in brief. Summary: RBA raised cash rate 25bp to 4.10% for a second straight meeting Decision was narrowly split 5–4, highlighting a finely balanced call Debate centred on timing, not direction, of further ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: AUD/USD extends rally as RBA hike boosts Aussie
item.description: The Australian Dollar extended its gains for the second straight day after the Reserve Bank of Australia raised rates by 25 basis points, as expected. At the time of writing, the AUD/USD trades at 0.7104, up 0.48%. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Recap: RBA lifts rate to 4.1%. Split decision. Inflation risks & capacity pressures build
item.description: RBA delivers split hike as inflation risks rise, with May tightening still in play. This via a recap note from Westpac. Summary: RBA hiked cash rate 25bp to 4.1% in a narrow 5–4 split decision Decision driven by capacity constraints and rising inflation expectations Middle East conflict and fuel price surge key inflation risk factors Labour market ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Global markets rise despite tensions, oil price hikes
item.description: Markets across the world including New Zealand have taken a breather from being pounded and are mostly in positive territory despite little having changed geopolitically. Fuente: NewsData NZD
